sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Evolution System
special_mechanics.description: Player character body divided into eight upgradeable sections. New abilities can be obtained through evolution including tail swings, greater jumping ability, and increased movement speed

special_mechanics.name: Temporary Form Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Crystals encountered during gameplay transform character into unique bodies for limited time duration

tier_notes: T2 empirical/qualitative data. No precise movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system information documented in available sources. Game is action-RPG hybrid with platforming mechanics where body upgrades modify movement capabilities, but specific physics values are not detailed in TCRF or Wikipedia documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - E.V.O.: Search for Eden
